privateAccountHint: Follow this account to see its posts and reviews.
removeFollowerDescription: They will no longer follow you. FindEat will not notify them.
foodProfileHint: Pronouns are the only detail that can appear on your profile. Birthday and food information stay private and are used only to personalize FindEat.
invalidBirthdayHint: Enter a valid date using DD/MM/YYYY.
allergySafetyNotice: Restaurant information can be incomplete. Always confirm allergies and dietary needs directly with the restaurant.
passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current password
chooseImageDescription: Where would you like to get the image from?
imagePickerError: Could not open or crop the selected image.
logoutConfirmation: Are you sure you want to logout?
unsavedChangesDescription: Do you want to save your changes before leaving?
noContentBody: When they share a post, it will appear here.
noContentOwnBody: Share your first food discovery with the FindEat community.
noReviewsBody: When they review a restaurant, it will appear here.
noReviewsOwnBody: Review a restaurant and help others find their next meal.
blockUserHint: They won't be able to find, follow, or message you
blockUserDescription: You will unfollow each other. They won't be able to find your profile, see your posts, follow you, or send you direct messages.
blockUserError: Could not block this user. Please try again.
userUnavailableHint: This account may not exist or may be unavailable to you.
creatorInsightsSubtitle: See how your profile and posts are performing.
creatorInsightsPromotionSubtitle: You reached 1,000 followers. Discover the creator tools being built for you.
profileStatisticsDescription: A future home for creators to understand their reach, content performance, and community growth.
statisticsNotCollected: These statistics are not being collected or displayed yet. They will be available as part of a future paid creator plan.

SWEET_TOOTH.name: Sweet Tooth
SWEET_TOOTH.description: Review {{count}} sweet or dessert dishes. Dentist not included.

BRUNCH_BOSS.name: Brunch Boss
BRUNCH_BOSS.description: Review {{count}} brunch dishes and own the late morning.

SUSHI_SENSEI.name: Sushi Sensei
SUSHI_SENSEI.description: Review {{count}} sushi dishes with serious roll knowledge.

BURGER_BANDIT.name: Burger Bandit
BURGER_BANDIT.description: Review {{count}} burgers. No bun is safe.

PASTA_LA_VISTA.name: Pasta La Vista
PASTA_LA_VISTA.description: Review {{count}} pasta dishes and never say arrivederci hungry.

CAFFEINE_OPERATIVE.name: Caffeine Operative
CAFFEINE_OPERATIVE.description: Review {{count}} coffee drinks on highly classified coffee business.

PLANT_POWERED.name: Plant Powered
PLANT_POWERED.description: Review {{count}} vegan dishes and keep it gloriously green.

STREET_FOOD_SCHOLAR.name: Street Food Scholar
STREET_FOOD_SCHOLAR.description: Review {{count}} street-food dishes. Your thesis is delicious.

DISH_DETECTIVE.name: Dish Detective
DISH_DETECTIVE.description: Review {{count}} dishes and leave no menu mystery unsolved.

profileTagUnlockInstructions.HOT_STUFF: Publish reviews containing {{count}} restaurant menu dishes tagged Spicy.
profileTagUnlockInstructions.SWEET_TOOTH: Publish reviews containing {{count}} restaurant menu dishes tagged Sweet or Dessert.
profileTagUnlockInstructions.BRUNCH_BOSS: Publish reviews containing {{count}} restaurant menu dishes tagged Brunch.
profileTagUnlockInstructions.SUSHI_SENSEI: Publish reviews containing {{count}} restaurant menu dishes tagged Sushi.
profileTagUnlockInstructions.BURGER_BANDIT: Publish reviews containing {{count}} restaurant menu dishes tagged Burger.
profileTagUnlockInstructions.PASTA_LA_VISTA: Publish reviews containing {{count}} restaurant menu dishes tagged Pasta.
profileTagUnlockInstructions.CAFFEINE_OPERATIVE: Publish reviews containing {{count}} restaurant menu drinks tagged Coffee.
profileTagUnlockInstructions.PLANT_POWERED: Publish reviews containing {{count}} restaurant menu dishes tagged Vegan.
profileTagUnlockInstructions.STREET_FOOD_SCHOLAR: Publish reviews containing {{count}} restaurant menu dishes tagged Street Food.
profileTagUnlockInstructions.DISH_DETECTIVE: Publish reviews covering {{count}} dishes. Custom dishes count toward this tag too.
